items.author: HoopsHype
items.body_excerpt:
Inspired by 82-0, we have put together this game we have called 73-9.

You have $100 million to spend on players to try to beat the 2015-16 Warriors.

It's a long shot, especially because you are constrained by money.

Shoot your shot, though!

Link: hoopsmatic.com/73-9-game

media.title: BREAKING: Lakers take chance on young wing player

items.title: A 12-2 run to close the quarter for the Pacers. It's 26-16 after one quarter, with Rienk Mast leading the way with seven points. Braden Smith assisted three of the Pacers four makes in that quarter.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: A 12-2 run to close the quarter for the Pacers. It's 26-16 after one quarter, with Rienk Mast leading the way with seven points. Braden Smith assisted three of the Pacers four makes in that quarter.
